title: crotalaria pterospartioides
intro: Crotalaria pterospartioides, also known as the Cape stack, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria pterospartioides include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. In traditional herbal preparations, Crotalaria pterospartioides is often made into a tea or infusion, which is said to provide relief from its listed health issues.
